title: Principal Frontend Developer at Cisco India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Cisco India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India South Asia Partners:
Cisco India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India South Asia Partners!
